audit_label: Dogfood Run 1 — research-os handbook (the user's own tool)
original_rubric_note: Produced before monorepo migration, when the rubric lived at E:/AI/cognitive-load-audit/cognitive-load-audit.md.
intent: Apply v0.2 against a real surface the user controls. NOT for rubric revision. Findings must be actionable.

target.platform: Starlight (Astro) docs site, just shipped v0.8.0 with Stage-D presentation polish
surfaces_audited: mobile menu trigger DOM-inspected (narrow-mode not directly rendered)

context.user_type: first-time visitor + returning operator + power user mix
context.task: audit shipped handbook for actionable polish
context.dense_state: Operator Playbook with 19 on-this-page anchors and 85 inline-code references serves as the dense state
context.low_bandwidth_state: auditor not in a constrained state
context.method: Path 1 live navigation full-width + DOM/CSS responsive inspection per v0.2 caveat
context.viewport_render_limitation: Same rig limitation as PT1 — DPI scaling + Chrome min-window prevents viewport <2266 CSS px. Narrow-mode behavior is Inferred from Starlight responsive breakpoints (50em / 72em) + media-query inspection.

text_load.notes: Five findings (1 Medium + 2 Low + F-DOG-04 cross-listed Medium + F-DOG-07 cross-listed Low). Below the 3-Highs Fail threshold. Mostly punch-list polish. P-DOG-01 canonical-source pattern is a positive worth propagating to other org docs.

measurable_defaults.notes: Body typography (16px / 28px line-height = 1.75) exceeds WCAG 2.2 1.4.12 minimums. System sans-serif stack. No measured contrast or full Lighthouse pass — OQ-DOG-01 carries from prior PTs.

hidden_load.notes: One High (F-DOG-05 mobile menu missing aria-label) + cross-listed F-DOG-04 and F-DOG-07. Below 3-Highs Fail. Search affordance (P-DOG-02) is excellent and mitigates Section 0 jargon concerns.

state_shift.notes: F-DOG-06 Medium — no font-size control beyond browser zoom. P-DOG-04 theme toggle is one-action and persistent — the partial offset.

ai_compression_risk.notes: Static docs surface; no AI generation. P-DOG-01 (canonical-source attribution) is the inverse of PT0's CL-03/CL-04 — exemplary provenance.

power_preservation.notes: One Medium (F-DOG-08 narrow-mode on-this-page rail hidden without overflow). Section 5 taxonomy: hidden. Power preserved through Starlight defaults; this is the one gap.

configuration_cost.notes: F-DOG-06 cross-listed. P-DOG-04 theme toggle accessibility is good.

evidence.notes: Observed: landing, Operator Playbook, Getting Started, search, theme toggle DOM. Inferred: narrow-mode behavior. Process gap: no Lighthouse pass yet (OQ-DOG-01).

findings.title: First sidebar item 'research-os' duplicates page H1
Domain jargon (Cowork, research-pack) used on landing page before being defined
Getting Started jumps from H1 to H2 'Requirements' with no intro paragraph
Operator Playbook on-this-page rail is dense (19 anchors)
Mobile menu trigger has no aria-label
No in-doc font-size or density control beyond theme toggle
13-item left sidebar is a flat list without grouping
Narrow-mode on-this-page rail is hidden entirely (no overflow path)
findings.evidence_summary: Starlight media-query (min-width: 72em) gates the right rail; below the breakpoint the rail is removed from layout with no overflow / collapse / jump-to substitute observed in the DOM.

open_questions.summary: No Lighthouse / axe / contrast measurement run on the handbook.
open_questions.resolution_path: Run Lighthouse against /handbook/ + 3 representative subpages; or axe-core via dev-server build.

open_questions.summary: Narrow-mode behavior is Inferred — rig DPI scaling prevents viewport <2266 CSS px.
open_questions.resolution_path: Re-run on non-DPI-scaled rig OR via Playwright with explicit setViewport({width:375,height:667}) OR verify on a mobile device.

positive_observations.summary: Operator Playbook carries explicit canonical-source attribution at the top: 'Canonical source: research-packs/docs/operator-playbook.md — update there first; this page is a full mirror.' Opposite of PT0's CL-03/CL-04. Worth propagating to other mirrored org docs.

Search dialog (Ctrl+K) is prominent, keyboard-accessible, and returns 6 contextual results for the query 'Cowork' across multiple pages with surrounding text shown. Section 2 recognition affordance done right.
Body typography (16px font, 28px line-height = 1.75 ratio) exceeds WCAG 2.2 1.4.12 minimums. System sans-serif stack. No decorative faces. Section 1 passes by default.
Theme toggle (Auto/Dark/Light) is one click in the top-right header, accessible from every page, persists across navigation. Section 3 one-action low-bandwidth control done right.
